maay_maay.function_grapher_keyboard_shortcuts_1_: Function grapher. Keyboard shortcuts: 1 ilaa 6 waxay doortaan nooca function-ka, D derivative, A bad, T shax, L baro.
maay_maay.where_the_function_crosses_the_x_axis_: Goobta function-ku ku gudbo axis-ka x. Goobahaan, f(x) = 0. Helidda roots waa muhiim algebra iyo calculus.
maay_maay.where_the_function_crosses_the_y_axis_: Goobta function-ku ku gudbo axis-ka y. Kani waa qiimaha f(0) — kaliya geli x = 0.
maay_maay.the_slope_tells_you_how_steep_the_func: Slope-ku waxuu ku sheegaa sida function-ku u dheer yahay goob kasta. Tangent line-ku wuxuu taabtaa curve-ka hal goob keliya. Isticmaal trace slider si aad u sahamiso!
maay_maay.the_derivative_measures_the_rate_of_ch: Derivative-ku wuxuu qiyaasaa rate-ka isbeddelka. Shid si aad u aragto sida slope-ku ugu beddelmo function-ka. Goobta f′(x) = 0, function-ku wuxuu leeyahay maximum ama minimum maxalli ah.
maay_maay.the_shaded_area_represents_the_integra: Bad-ka hadhaysan wuxuu matalaa integral — «ururinta» guud ee f(x). Nolosha dhabta, tani waxay noqon kartaa masaafo la maray, tamar la isticmaalay, ama probability.
maay_maay.when_a_0_the_parabola_opens_up_when_a_: Marka a > 0, parabola-du kor bay u furataa (⏣). Marka a < 0, hoos bay u furataa (⏢). Vertex waa goobta laalaabashada. Isku day inaad beddesho 'a' si aad u aragto!
maay_maay.amplitude_a_controls_the_height_freque: Amplitude (a) wuxuu maamulaa dhererka, frequency (b) wuxuu maamulaa inta cycles, phase shift (c) wuxuu u guuriyaa wave-ka bidix/midig. Period = 2π/b.
maay_maay.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: adoo isticmaalaya erayo maalinle fudud iyo weedho gaagaaban, la'aan erayo farsamo
maay_maay.for_a_high_school_algebra_or_pre_calc_: ardayga high school ee algebra ama pre-calc, oo leh erayo sida slope, intercept, vertex, period, iyo amplitude
maay_maay.click_explain_for_the_ai_tutor_to_desc: Riix «Sharrax» si AI tutor-ku ugu sharraxo function-kan reading level-ka aad dooratay.
maay_maay.function_zoo_six_common_function_shape: Function zoo — lix qaab oo function caadi ah
maay_maay.sliders_for_amplitude_frequency_phase_: Sliders loogu talagalay amplitude, frequency, phase. Discrete 5-state classification. Score ma leh, reveal ma leh.
maay_maay.hypothesis_how_does_phase_shift_affect: Hypothesis: Phase shift sidee u saameeyaa wave-ka la arko?
maay_maay.find_two_settings_that_produce_visuall: Hel laba settings oo soo saara waves isku mid ah muuqaal ahaan.
maay_maay.explain_how_each_parameter_shapes_a_si: Sharrax sida parameter kastaa u qaabeeyo sine wave.
maay_maay.design_note_discrete_5_state_marker_no: Design note: discrete 5-state marker; wave score ma leh; reveal ma leh — design ahaan.
